name: Ibeam
description: Capital I-beams standing and lying down, the girders re-colouring each seed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(15% 0, 85% 0, 85% 28%, 64% 28%, 64% 72%, 85% 72%, 85% 100%, 15% 100%, 15% 72%, 36% 72%, 36% 28%, 15% 28%); clip-path: polygon(15% 0, 85% 0, 85% 28%, 64% 28%, 64% 72%, 85% 72%, 85% 100%, 15% 100%, 15% 72%, 36% 72%, 36% 28%, 15% 28%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
